h8ec22db7g75aag4e45g84a9g7c660c59b104: It happened to you again, didn't it? Another dream.
h5e036202gb670g4d6fg8d82gaed7b5124bf3: You're too worried about these dreams - it's the conscious hours that matter.
h87464672g8b41g4536g8d31g261ec4c949f4: That's all it was - just another dream.
h1278f2b0ge886g45d7gbedbg6676bf66efd3: This was real. Something out there is trying to talk to me - to us.
h9b120701g1bf8g4272gbb29g04d8bc89d64e: No. I was deep in meditation all night - no dreams.
h52e20615g3047g47acgb581gd4e1c348e110: I slept soundly all night. No dreams.
h39503d15g850eg4ee9ga582gdc3823c59b71: You can't keep denying this; just trust me. I know you had another dream... so did I. Another dream with a visitor.
h5c9f55ffg702fg4aaeg9e93g104269041f4c: Only this time there was more. Much more.
h4300af8cg818cg45adgb0e4g603a78438e50: I don't know what you mean. Honestly.
hacedfedbgd376g43e4g9d8eg37af9d3c1189: You know exactly what I mean. Please just drop the charade.
h097aa84cgf9b5g48d8ga174gafad2ed3ea89: Tell her what you experienced: the army, the bloodletting, what came after.
had32f92ag93ffg4bc2gb478gaf35c5f0877b: It was the same for me - I lead an army, spilled a worldful of blood, all for his embrace.
h95160c9cg87cfg4b23gbc1cg7d2e59dfdcc2: I still feel the warmth of his touch. And the screams of those I slaughtered for him.
h39113e66g55e1g4165gb0c6g8b7603a85fec: Did you want it? What you saw?
h175a3920g272cg45c2g8fcag7fe34ce10d4d: I did. I wanted it all.
h5ab75915g66c3g47cegbea5g0a2044e70bf5: Me too. Whoever's doing this knows me well.
h38b75e0eg3f86g442fg810bg8ec1a86e2861: Not a good idea. You've been doing so well - seeing my wildest fantasies may discourage you.
h40fd94f1g1130g442cg8090ge0ff410a61ce: Such a touching scene - I almost hate to interrupt it. But you were not the only ones to dream this night.
hdfe1ab5eg080bg415dgb26bg049d6bfb2e64: Has it escaped you that exploiting the tadpole conjures these visions for us all?
h944e2315g9119g480fgb768g1cfa2bf96a4f: Perhaps it's time we stopped indulging in the more useful aspects of these parasites.
h95cc010fg693eg409bg95f6g3346241cf769: For once, she speaks sense. Whatever the parasite offers, deny it.
h76278d18gb403g4dabgacdag1e4291f34e17: We should stop using the parasites. They can only mean trouble - and we've plenty of that already.
h0f0feaadg5849g403fg817bgfa8dedece277: Agreed. These dreams are getting more vivid... we need to do what we can to resist them.
h568f66fagbea3g4eacgaa0dg9caee596c4cb: The parasites have proved useful. It'd be foolish of us to just ignore that advantage.
hd6582e68ga3c1g4a4cg829ege5047cfee21c: Advantage, or trap? As much as I usually respect you, I think you're wrong here. These dreams are dangerous.
h2e849d06g167eg4d8eg9552g4c632c78e8b5: You can put your own sanity at risk then. I want an end to these dreams.
hcc1e0a74g43cfg4590g9d64gf94adf30d4cf: Agreed - enough with the mind-twiddling. I'm not keen on travelling wherever these dreams lead us.
heaf2d465ga051g4de3gb07dgb4cc0c195f5d: I said they were connected, I didn't say we should stop. Let's not throw away that power over some dreams.
h0421ad3eg87acg4791g9a6egb3072c68f6fc: |Karlach: Yeah, we need to stop. Who knows what these visions might bring?|
hac8b5205g6b4dg4447ga401ga55bab27b87f: Perhaps it's time indeed. The power to bend wills is a mind flayer specialty. We're the ones who are truly at risk.
h1eb13750gd4bdg4e59g88b5g3fadc5e7d668: I hear you had dreams too? The brain-bugs got busy last night. And I've got a theory.
hdb5c5ec7g49e6g4fccg99a9g96d28a6a31d1: When you call on the tadpole to influence others, we pay the price that very night. All of us.
hb5d41bd2gecc1g4d56g8d14g015af3ecb6e0: I couldn't help but eavesdrop on you. It seems we all had interesting dreams.
hc92f02a3gbc71g4e1cgadf5gacfecadd77a5: Since we started using our condition to influence others, I've been hearing things at night. And now these dreams? They have to be connected.
h8c318e43gbeefg451bga660gd646c6774ccb: |It's caused by using the tadpole to steer minds.|
h3baa7bcbg5383g4636gbbe4gbf7f516d1293: Those visions of yours, Shadowheart, they aren't dreams - they're projections. Illithid ones.
h32022a4fg9a29g4b11g900bg7faae7b82b46: The tadpoles give us the power to bend others' wills, but using that power clearly comes at a price. Are we willing to pay it?
h7e85dd24g1c12g43c2g83ebgba96d1f3317a: |It's caused by using the tadpole to steer minds.|
hdd40e37cg5f1fg4036g84ddg051de42e9a16: |It's caused by using the tadpole to steer minds.|
hd3f3282fgc8cbg43aeg9a12g06129bf34e13: These dreams - they seem to come to us after we use our powers to get in others' heads.
h67590ff2geef6g4588g860eg7665767ca648: Tempting. It would be good for you to have a role model. But I don't think so.
h8b125883ge287g4239g849dgcbd6aa1b6dc0: What appealed to you most: the blood, the power or the love?
hb60bbc23g11c9g4866gbb4bg5e3f3e583856: They're the same. Blood and love are just different forms of power.
h92a0b1feg30d3g40e3g9543ga9adec4bda6f: Enough talk. We need to go.
h6c58838bg4ab6g48dag828cg788a597a3831: Did your visitor ask for something in return?
he3f4ff19gfeebg4240gac2eg33de773742a6: Are you serious? How could I possibly want that?
h7da87981gb80dg4f2fga972g8fc3f0ffd712: I wanted it. I thought you were the same.
h54e973deg669dg4651gbdbfgb0c1e2e98061: It was just a dream. Doesn't matter whether I wanted it or not.
h01d3a41cg61c2g4c36g9249gb95b70fd5faf: Assuming it is just a dream.
hca44df89gf49bg4482g8fe6gd2df9058f922: I wanted it. All of it. And I think you feel the same.
hb28b9008g1ef8g4f6bg8aedg25fed6eda2db: My dream was very personal. Not sure I want to share.
hc7524919g50d5g4c6agae0fg3bf8c4013b7f: Don't be coy - it's already shared. You killed and conquered, then bedded your paramour.
h7b579b61g24f2g42d7g8459gc50cb81ba10e: It's a waste of time to dwell on dreams - no matter how vivid.
hd0c2a590g74d0g495bg8335gf9910c075599: Pity. I'd hoped you'd trust me, after all we've been through. Doesn't matter though - I know what you saw.
h34bc2fe6gc5c1g4bc7gba67gc7304d3b72cb: You led an army, slaughtering any who stood against you. Then you embraced your lover.
h3ee472a1ga2f0g458bg8d84g004b9cd8cd95: Fine, lie to yourself. It doesn't change what we saw.
h79d5a2f3gb08cg4bacg895eg8887b7809071: There's no charade, just confusion. I truly don't know what you're talking about.
hd1acc089g4766g4841g824bg236764f584ab: It's all right, you can trust me. I know you had another dream... so did I. Another dream with a visitor.
h4259ebedg1fc0g4410g8135g837db0b0b2ba: Please, not this again. We both know what happened. We both know who came to us, again.
h0eb92ebcg6124g4b2agb124g1b9ae58aff1d: We both know that's not true. The visitor from before came to us again, in our dreams.
h707dbb29g64a5g4219gaf47g65f8785306be: I know what you've been talking about. And what you've been dreaming about.
hf1fbae3fg7a48g44bdg9a52g6798f2a24e61: Your mystery lover came to you again, yes? You saw yourself with them, conquering...
